instructions: Before starting a task, set its status to in_progress.
When a task is complete, set its status to done.
After each task is done, write a memory dump file under memory_dump using the task number in the filename.
Each memory dump must include relevant context needed to continue later: changes made, files touched, architectural decisions, verification, and next task context.
After writing a memory dump, compact context by preserving only the information needed to move forward.

tasks.title: Create implementation checkpoint plan and backlog
tasks.description: Populate plan.md and todo.json with the implementation strategy, architectural rules, task backlog, and checkpoint protocol.

tasks.title: Scaffold Node workspace and package boundaries
tasks.description: Create the npm workspace, TypeScript project references, package manifests, source directories, and an import-boundary checker matching the Rust crate dependency direction.

tasks.title: Implement domain package
tasks.description: Implement domain entities, status values, domain errors, repository ports, and unit-of-work ports for books, book copies, members, and loans.

tasks.title: Implement application commands and queries
tasks.description: Implement CQRS application services. All workflow/business orchestration belongs here: catalog, lending, and membership commands and queries.

tasks.title: Implement auth-core package
tasks.description: Implement claims, auth errors, auth verifier port, and JWT adapter without coupling auth to application business logic.

tasks.title: Implement PostgreSQL persistence adapters
tasks.description: Implement read repositories, transaction-scoped write repositories, SQL mappers, and write unit-of-work factory while preserving command/query repository split and row-locking behavior.

tasks.title: Implement server bootstrap composition root
tasks.description: Load environment configuration, create read/write pools, instantiate adapters, wire commands and queries, and expose transport-ready dependency groups.

tasks.title: Implement HTTP transport
tasks.description: Implement Express or Fastify HTTP server with separate HTTP DTOs, thin route handlers, auth middleware, CORS, health route, and HTTP error mapping.

tasks.title: Implement GraphQL transport
tasks.description: Implement GraphQL server with separate GraphQL input/object types, thin resolvers, auth middleware, CORS, and GraphQL error mapping.

tasks.title: Add focused tests
tasks.description: Add tests for domain transitions, command orchestration with fake repositories/unit of work, and import-boundary enforcement.

tasks.title: Run verification and finalize implementation notes
tasks.description: Run typecheck, tests, and boundary checks. Record any blockers and final usage notes.

tasks.title: Switch GraphQL transport schema construction to Pothos
tasks.description: Replace SDL/resolver-object GraphQL schema construction with Pothos while preserving thin resolvers, separate GraphQL types, auth, and package import boundaries.

tasks.title: Split GraphQL operations into bounded subsections
tasks.description: Refactor the Pothos GraphQL schema into catalog, lending, and membership subsections with separate types, queries, and mutations, matching the Rust GraphQL module organization while preserving thin transport behavior.

tasks.title: Restore Rust field names across Node layers
tasks.description: Audit domain, application inputs, persistence mappers, HTTP DTOs, and GraphQL DTOs for renamed Rust data fields, then restore Rust field names such as dt_created, dt_modified, author_name, full_name, max_active_loans, member_ident, and book_copy_barcode.

tasks.title: Replace bootstrap random ident generation with nanoid
tasks.description: Replace the hand-rolled crypto/base64url membership identifier generator in server-bootstrap with nanoid while preserving the application IdentGenerator port.

tasks.title: Plan pg-typed migration for persistence SQL
tasks.description: Write a persistence-local plan for replacing hand-written SQL string constants and manual query generics with pg-typed generated query modules. Do not implement the migration.
